---
title: "Chosen People: A Compendium of Sacred and Church History for School Children, The. By the author of the “Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

## Chosen People: A Compendium of Sacred and Church History for School Children, The. By the author of the “Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1859
**Genre:** Non-fiction: history, theology
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John and Charles Mozley, 6, Paternoster Row, London. Masters and Co., 78, New Bond Street, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
